components.value: V, S, M (a bit of horse hair)

description.value: You summon a light horse or a pony (your choice) to serve you as a mount. The steed serves willingly and well. The mount comes with a bit and bridle and a riding saddle. Mount, Communal This spell functions like mount, except you can summon up to six light horses or ponies, and you divide the duration in 2-hour increments among the steeds summoned.
